title: Fashion Inspiration: Easter 2016

content:
I don’t know about you, but I hate when my holidays are back-to-back! Just last week was

St. Patrick’s Day

and all I could think about was green and gold and shamrocks. Now it’s already Easter week and I have to think about Springtime and bunnies! In case you need a little fashion inspiration for the fast approaching holiday, here are TWO looks you can shop right now for Easter 2016!

Whether you are planning on wearing your Sunday’s best to church or just want a super cute casual look for Easter, these outfits have got you covered! Mix and match some of the accessories between each style!

Radiant of Sunshine Dress in Turquoise: ModCloth

Linen Chevron Tank: Gap

Slim Fit Pants in Light Turquoise: H&M

Patterned Silk Scarf: H&M

Floppy Straw Hat: Urban Outfitters

Aldo Booties: DSW

Gold Thong Sandals: Target

Kate Spade Gold Cuff Bracelet: Macy’s

Essie Nail Polish in Sunshine State of Mind: Amazon

Lavender Daisy Earrings: Katie Crafts

Which item would you wear on Easter?
